{"id":"project-LICHEN-xa26","title":"edhoc: _decode_cbor_sequence only catches CBORDecodeEOF","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Lines: 189-199

The _decode_cbor_sequence function catches only CBORDecodeEOF but not other CBOR decoding exceptions:

```python
def _decode_cbor_sequence(data: bytes) -> list:
    items = []
    fp = io.BytesIO(data)
    while fp.tell() < len(data):
        try:
            item = cbor2.load(fp)
            items.append(item)
        except cbor2.CBORDecodeEOF:
            break
    return items
```

Malformed CBOR data (e.g., invalid type indicators, truncated values) will raise CBORDecodeError or other exceptions that propagate uncaught. This causes cryptic error messages instead of clear 'malformed message' errors.

Fix: Either catch CBORDecodeError or let exceptions propagate with added context (e.g., 'Failed to decode CBOR sequence').","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:09.187132Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:09.187174Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-xa26","title":"edhoc: _decode_cbor_sequence only catches CBORDecodeEOF","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Lines: 189-199

The _decode_cbor_sequence function catches only CBORDecodeEOF but not other CBOR decoding exceptions:

```python
def _decode_cbor_sequence(data: bytes) -> list:
    items = []
    fp = io.BytesIO(data)
    while fp.tell() < len(data):
        try:
            item = cbor2.load(fp)
            items.append(item)
        except cbor2.CBORDecodeEOF:
            break
    return items
```

Malformed CBOR data (e.g., invalid type indicators, truncated values) will raise CBORDecodeError or other exceptions that propagate uncaught. This causes cryptic error messages instead of clear 'malformed message' errors.

Fix: Either catch CBORDecodeError or let exceptions propagate with added context (e.g., 'Failed to decode CBOR sequence').","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:09.187132Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T04:02:33.591719366Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T04:02:33.591719366Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T04:07:33.591719366Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T04:02:33.591719366Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: d737f6e0f\n_decode_cbor_sequence now properly handles CBORDecodeEOF to terminate sequence decoding and CBORDecodeError for malformed data, providing clear ValueError per the bead. Updated to standard CBOR sequence decoding pattern. Lint and tests run (pre-existing issues in surrounding code noted)."}

Fixed _decode_cbor_sequence to catch CBORDecodeEOF for normal sequence termination and CBORDecodeError for malformed data, raising clear ValueError. Improved error handling as described. Ran ruff, mypy, and pytest (noted pre-existing EDHOC refactoring issues in file). Committed and pushed.
